_readme: Declare apps here, then restart. CUSTOM apps: LOCAL dev auto-scaffolds a missing one using the fields below; PRODUCTION requires its source under apps/<name>/ + an image rebuild. EXTERNAL apps (git URL): LOCAL dev git-fetches them at runtime; PRODUCTION requires an image rebuild (fetched at build). External 'branch' MUST match the ERPNext major in the Dockerfile (e.g. version-15).

_custom_fields.name: REQUIRED — app module name, snake_case (e.g. my_app).
_custom_fields.title: optional — human-readable title (default: Title-cased name).
_custom_fields.license: optional — SPDX id: mit | agpl-3.0 | gpl-3.0 | apache-2.0 | bsd-3-clause | unlicense ... (default: mit).
